paper.title: What Papers Don't Tell You: Recovering Tacit Knowledge for Automated Paper Reproduction

official_release_audit.paper_statement: The code will be publicly released upon acceptance; the repository link will be provided in the final version.
queries: web: exact title + PaperRepro + code + GitHub
GitHub repository API: Recovering Tacit Knowledge
official_release_audit.notes: No search result could be tied to the paper or its authors. The similarly named luolin101/PaperRepro repository is an unrelated social-science reproducibility-assessment system, as established from its README, repository metadata, and commit history; it is not treated as paper release evidence. Search absence is time-bounded and not proof that no private or later release exists.

appendix_inventory_audit.method: Counted TeX table rows between Training Set Sources, Validation Set Sources, and Test Set Sources markers for every benchmark subsubsection in data/papers/source/2603.01801v1/GSci.tex.
appendix_inventory_audit.identity_mismatch: The main result table includes GeneralGL and GSL but not Imputation or TGL; the appendix inventories Imputation and TGL but not GeneralGL or GSL.

headline_arithmetic_audit.interpretation: The stated 24.68% improvement reproduces as an absolute 24.682 percentage-point difference between the ten displayed task means, not a 24.68% relative reduction.
